title: Roll quarterly access review for Q2 on Okta — Q1 sample identified 14 stale grants
description: Q1 access review (TEST-IAM-ACCESS-REVIEW-001) flagged 14 dormant Okta accounts with privileged roles. Need to deprovision + re-run the review with the deprovisioning evidence attached.

title: Re-assess Annex III applicability under EU AI Act Digital Omnibus dating
description: Change event CE-2026-0001 revised high-risk application dates. Re-walk APP-EUAI-HIGH-RISK-ANNEXIII-001 + downstream controls; confirm whether the staggered date applies to our Acme Hire Score deployment.

title: Decommission legacy AS/400 payroll system before exception expires
description: Exception EXC-2026-0002 carved out the legacy AS/400 from access-review automation until decommission. Decommission deadline 2026-12-31. Task tracks the migration to the new payroll service.
